Task / Activity: Familiarization of existing methodologies for agent creation
Description / Explanation: Review Salesforce Agentforce/Einstein Copilot documentation, LLM capabilities, and existing AI Agent patterns specific to financial and media data reconciliation.
Synthesize research to define the agent's persona. Map out the architecture, identify required custom actions (Apex/Flows), and finalize the cross-object data model.
Document and finalize the core scenarios the agent will identify (e.g., Perfect Match, Under-delivery/Overbilling, Rate Mismatches).
Draft the explicit mathematical logic the agent uses to reconcile (e.g., Expected Amount = Ad Server Qty * IO Rate) and how it flags variances.
Provision the Salesforce sandbox, verify necessary licenses/managed packages (Media Cloud), configure custom objects, and load mock test data.
Enable Einstein Copilot/Agentforce, assign necessary permission sets to users, and initialize the basic framework for the Reconciliation Agent.
Build the explicit step-by-step Salesforce Flows, Prompt Templates, and orchestration logic that the Agent will follow when a user prompts it.
Write the custom Apex Actions for intensive calculations, configure the Agent's conversational instructions, and build the final 'Exception Report' output format.
Conduct Unit testing using the mock data, End-to-End conversation simulations to test LLM reasoning, and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
